title: Denmark national football team
displaytitle: Denmark national football team

titles.display: Denmark national football team

extract: The Denmark national football team represents Denmark including Greenland, but not Faroe Islands, in men's international football competitions. It is controlled by the Danish Football Association (DBU), the governing body for the football clubs which are organised under DBU. Denmark's home stadium is Parken Stadium in the Østerbro district of Copenhagen.
extract_html: The Denmark national football team represents Denmark including Greenland, but not Faroe Islands, in men's international football competitions. It is controlled by the Danish Football Association (DBU), the governing body for the football clubs which are organised under DBU. Denmark's home stadium is Parken Stadium in the Østerbro district of Copenhagen.
